title: Dark Roasted Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A light and flavorful post-workout dish featuring dark roasted Argentinian beef skewers with a sweet and savory molasses glaze, perfect for a low-sodium diet. This recipe is easy to make and packed with protein.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together molasses, olive oil, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the molasses glaze.
Thread the beef cubes, red bell pepper, and onion onto skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to desired doneness.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
